Anime Radar Circuit
This is a Web Ring to hope gain exposure to your anime or manga related site. Unlike most web ring masters, I wont promise that your visitor rate will hit the route, however this is a good way to gain exposure and possibly new regular visitors to your site.

What Happened to the DBZ Unlimited Ring?
Things were not working out, about 70% of the members in the ring no longer had the code on their site. My apologies to the 3 or 4 people who had the ring code up but I got frustrated with having to keep deleting pages from the ring. Most of the members without the code were already enlisted before I became webmaster of DBZ Unlimited. If there is anyone who was planning to join the DBZU Ring or a previous member, please resubmit to this one.

Rules and Regulations: To prevent previous problems I have with submissions I have revised the rules a bit
    1) All submissions must be Anime related. Having 1 picture of an anime character on your site does not count.
    2) You may not have more than 1 pop-up window on your page. People hosted by Geocities or similar hosts who have multiple frames will be taken into consideration.
    3) If you do not know how to put up the code don't ask for my assistance. The directions on how to add the code to your page correctly are found on the top of the codes page. IF you dont know how to put up a simple ring code on your page you obviously have some homework to do on HTML design.
    4) You will have up to 3 days maximum to add the code to your page. After this it will be deleted from the Queue.
    5) Once the code is on your page leave it there. Any offenders of this rule will be deleted without notice. If you have a special page for web rings, make sure that the link can be found
    6) All hentai pages and/or adult sites will be deleted without question. There are special places that serve the needs of adult sites. This however is not one of them.
If you feel that you can easily follow these rules and would like to join, please submit your site. To get the required code, please click here.
